title: 抖音频道 Douyin Channel Setup
description: Primary platform — 60%+ of xiangqi viewers. Short-form + live streaming focus.

tasks.text: Register Douyin creator account with consistent branding
Design profile banner and avatar (象棋 themed)
Write bio: niche positioning + value proposition
Set up OBS → Douyin Live RTMP streaming pipeline
Test vertical video recording workflow (board capture + voiceover)
Publish 3 test videos, analyze Douyin algorithm response
First live stream: 2-hour chess session with commentary
Register on 巨量星图 when eligible for brand deals
